candidate_llm_application: SHERPA-RAPPEL: cascading multi-hop reasoning with per-step explicit anchor_check + mandatory overlap (step k+1's input includes step k's anchor_check) + dynamic K-step controller

results.title: Two-Stage LLM Verified XAI Framework (WCCI 2026 / 2026/04)
results.reason: Explainer+Verifier two-stage with iterative refeed is functional twin of per-step anchor_check + mandatory overlap. Triple hit.

results.title: Focused Chain-of-Thought Efficient LLM Reasoning (2025/11)
results.reason: Focused per-step reasoning with adaptive checkpoints covers cascading reasoning + per-step verification. Triple hit.

results.title: Survey Chain-of-X Paradigms (COLING 2025)
results.reason: Chain-of-X survey formalizes per-step Feedback nodes — author explicitly acknowledges this in novelty claim. Triple hit.

results.title: Adaptive Thinking LLMs When to Think Latent Space (Sonata)
results.reason: Self-Consistency-Guided Adapter for adaptive thinking-budget IS the dynamic K-step controller. Triple hit.

results.title: Rewarding Progress Scaling Automated Process Verifiers (NeurIPS 2024)
results.reason: Per-step Process Reward Model with TD verification = exact anchor_check mechanism. Triple hit.

results.title: Process Reward Models That Think ThinkPRM (2025/04)
results.reason: EXACT TWIN — ThinkPRM verifies every step via generative CoT; per-step anchor_check is generative PRM by another name. Triple hit at maximum.

results.title: AgentPRM Process Reward Models LLM Agents Step-Wise (WWW 2026)
results.reason: Step-wise PRM for agents covers per-step anchor_check + dynamic stop. Triple hit.

results.title: Process Supervision CoT Monte Carlo Net Information Gain (2026/03)
results.reason: Monte Carlo net-information-gain per-step supervision is functionally IDENTICAL to dynamic-K controller monitoring marginal-information-gain (candidate's own wording). Triple hit.

verdict_reason: Total hits = 8 (>=1). SHERPA-RAPPEL is fully covered by prior art: ThinkPRM (2504.16828) and PAV (2410.08146) cover per-step anchor_check via generative/TD process reward; AgentPRM covers step-wise verification for agents; Sonata adaptive-thinking covers dynamic K-step controller; Chain-of-X survey formalizes Feedback nodes; Monte Carlo net-information-gain (2603.17815) covers marginal-info-gain stop criterion. Author's own novelty claim explicitly acknowledges 'recombination of existing components'.
